fields.name: FA Posting Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting type, if Account Type field contains Fixed Asset.

fields.name: Depreciation Book Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the depreciation book to which the line will be posted if you have selected Fixed Asset in the Type field for this line.

fields.name: Part of Book Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies that entries posted with the FA Posting Type field will be part of the book value.

fields.name: Part of Depreciable Basis
fields.tooltip: Specifies that entries posted with the FA Posting Type field will be part of the depreciable basis.

fields.name: Include in Depr. Calculation
fields.tooltip: Specifies that entries posted with the FA Posting Type field must be included in periodic depreciation calculations.

fields.name: Include in Gain/Loss Calc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies that entries posted with the FA Posting Type field must be included in the calculation of gain or loss for a sold asset.

fields.name: Reverse before Disposal
fields.tooltip: Specifies that entries posted with the FA Posting Type field must be reversed (that is, set to zero) before disposal.

fields.name: Sign
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the type in the FA Posting Type field should be a debit or a credit.

fields.name: Depreciation Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies that entries posted with the FA Posting Type field will be regarded as part of the total depreciation for the fixed asset.

fields.name: Acquisition Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies that entries posted with the FA Posting Type must be part of the total acquisition for the fixed asset in the Fixed Asset - Book Value 01 report.
